D:\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\appqt.dir/objects.a
D:\Qt\Tools\llvm-mingw1706_64\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\appqt.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\appqt.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Qt\Tools\llvm-mingw1706_64\bin\clang++.exe -g -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\appqt.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o appqt.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libappqt.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\appqt.dir\linkLibs.rsp
